description: Ville sainte d'Iran, Machhad accueille des millions de pèlerins au sanctuaire de l'Imam Reza, l'un des plus vastes complexes religieux du monde.

description_en: Machhad, in Iran, is a halal-friendly destination with a Halal Trust Score of 4.7/5. Muslim travelers will find 36 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — a complete guide to travel with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Machhad: 36 halal restaurants listed, 1 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 4.7/5.
